description: Legal document involving a partnership between a large number of the Jewish merchants active in Egypt ca. 1800 CE: Shelomo Cesana, Ḥayyim Cesana, Avraham Cesana in Alexandria; and Merkado Karo and Avraham ha-Levi and Hayyim Nuṣayri (?) and Shimʿon Frances and Khalifa Pinto and Yaʿaqov Bibas and Meʾir ben Naʿim. This appears to be a draft of JRL SERIES L 18. MCD. ASE.
tags: late prosopography, Ya'aqov Bibas, Merkado Karo, Cesana, 19th c, Partnership, Avraham ha-Levi, Pinto, Bibas, Karo y Frances, Late Heb, Shim'on Frances
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בכיא פריז.
